name: Popeye's Spinach Dip
recipeIngredient: 10 oz. frozen chopped spinach, thawed, drained
1 8 oz. can water chestnuts, drained and chopped
1 6 oz. can shrimp, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the spinach and drain it, then squeeze out any excess moisture.
2. Combine all ingredients in a bowl or blender.
3. Chill the dip before serving.
4. Serve with raw vegetables like celery, carrots, bell pepper strips, broccoli or cauliflower florets.
5. For an attractive presentation, serve the dip in a round loaf of sourdough bread.
6. Cut off the top of the loaf and hollow out the center.
7. Fill the cavity with the chilled dip.
8. Serve with bread cubes, whole wheat crackers and raw vegetables.
9. Makes 3 cups
